original_snippet_context: Discussion of exchange rates in Rio
relevant_quote: A' taxa de 15 3/8 que foi a official de hontem, para letras a 90 dias de vista, a libra esterlina vale 15$780, o franco $620 e o marco $710. A' vista (15 1/4), a libra vale 15$737, o franco $626 e o marco $772, a lira italiana $028, cem réis fortes 3$55 e o dollar 3$213.
justification: This snippet provides information about current exchange rates, including the value of the pound sterling, franc, and mark against the mil-réis. It doesn't express any opinion about the *Caixa de Conversão* itself or any related monetary policy.
